activities_projects.title: Critical Analysis of Hari Singh
steps: Analyse Hari Singh’s actions
Explain whether he is justified in his choices

activities_projects.title: Trust vs Betrayal
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the conflict of trust and betrayal
steps: Identify incidents of trust and betrayal
Explain how they shape the story

activities_projects.title: Psychology of a Thief
activities_projects.objective: Understand the mental state of Hari Singh
steps: Identify thoughts expressed by Hari Singh
Analyse his fear, guilt, and hope

activities_projects.title: Role of Compassion
steps: Identify acts of kindness by Anil
Explain how compassion changes Hari Singh

activities_projects.title: Alternative Ending
steps: Imagine Hari Singh did not return
Write an alternative ending

activities_projects.title: Education as Transformation
activities_projects.objective: Analyse education as a turning point
steps: Identify learning moments
Explain how education reforms Hari Singh

activities_projects.title: Moral Complexity of the Story
steps: Identify morally complex situations
Explain why the story is not black and white

activities_projects.title: Narrator Reliability
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the reliability of the narrator
steps: Identify bias in narration
Explain how it affects reader understanding

activities_projects.title: Social Background Reflection
activities_projects.objective: Analyse social conditions in the story
steps: Identify social issues hinted in the story
Explain their influence on characters

activities_projects.title: Author’s Message on Humanity
steps: Identify values promoted by the author
Explain how the story conveys them
